case_title: TIMOTEO RECINOS VS. JOHN C. SHEERAN

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RECINOS, TIMOTEO AS TO DEFENDANT SHEERAN, JOHN C. , AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECINOS, TIMOTEO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHEERAN, JOHN C. , AN INDIVIDUAL $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $156.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,156.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED, JUDGMENT ASSIGNED TO CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU AND INSTITUTO LABORAL DE LA RAZA AS ASSIGNEE OF RECORD FILED BY PLAINTIFF RECINOS, TIMOTEO AS TO DEFENDANT SHEERAN, JOHN C. , AN INDIVIDUAL
